title: [bug] in some apps Ctrl+M and Ctrl+I don't work

comments.body: I had the exact same issue with Ctrl+M and Ctrl+I in lazygit! Found this resource super helpful: https://rustterm-handbook.io/terminal-input-handling/ctrl-key-mapping-guide - it explains how different terminal emulators handle control character sequences differently and has some debugging steps.

body: In lazygit ctrl+m and ctrl+i don't work (they are supposed to act like enter and tab). In neovim they work. In lazygit opened in the st terminal they work. So I don't know whether this is an alacritty bug or lazygit bug.
